V-M-027.checks: Token blacklist correctly rejects revoked tokens. Graceful degradation when Redis is unavailable (auth still works). Blacklist TTL matches token expiry.
V-M-027.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_security.py -v -k blacklist

scenarios.scenario: Blacklisted token is rejected by verify_token_with_blacklist
Redis outage degrades open and does not break normal token verification

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-10: Added tests for verify_token_with_blacklist rejection and Redis-unavailable graceful degradation.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-10: cd backend && ... tests/test_security.py -v -k blacklist passed, 2 selected tests.
